penalty.description: Per-assignment penalty override (0–100). When null, the TM's default penalty applies.

priority.description: Priority in suggestion results (lower = higher priority). When null, the assignment is placed after every existing one (max + 1) so it stacks at the bottom of the list.

readAccess.description: Whether this project can read from the TM

writeAccess.description: Whether this project writes new translations to the TM
